institution.name: Blue Ridge Community and Technical College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blue Ridge Community and Technical College fell 40% between 2008 and 2009 (21.0% → 12.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Blue Ridge Community and Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Blue Ridge Community and Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $4.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blue Ridge Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
